# tfe_variable

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `category` (String) Whether this is a Terraform or environment variable. Valid values are "terraform" or "env".
- `key` (String) Name of the variable.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `description` (String)
- `hcl` (Boolean)
- `sensitive` (Boolean)
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Value of the variable
- `value_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Value of the variable in write-only mode
- `value_wo_version` (Number) Version of the write-only value to trigger updates
- `variable_set_id` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the variable
- `readable_value` (String) A non-sensitive read-only copy of the variable value, which can be viewed or referenced in plan outputs without being redacted. Will only be present if the variable is not sensitive
